marketplace.name: api-test-runner
marketplace.description: Execute API test cases from Swagger / OpenAPI specs using Playwright. Auto-acquires bearer tokens, loads parameters from files, and streams results to a live dashboard with charts, stack traces, and PDF export.
marketplace.longDescription: A Claude Code plugin that turns any Swagger or OpenAPI specification into an executable API test suite. Point it at a spec file, name a method and endpoint, and it handles the rest — parses path/query/body parameters from spec definitions, makes an automatic bearer token call when the spec declares security schemes, and executes the request via Playwright's HTTP engine. Every run is persisted to a local JSON history and pushed via Server-Sent Events to a real-time dashboard running at http://localhost:3737. The dashboard plots response-time trends and pass/fail distribution, lets you expand any failure row to inspect the response body, stack trace, and request metadata, filter and sort the full execution history, and export a multi-page PDF report. A SessionStart hook auto-installs Node.js, npm dependencies, and Playwright browser binaries on first use, so the plugin works out-of-the-box on a fresh machine. A PostToolUse hook prints the dashboard link in the terminal after every API test execution.

skills.name: api-test-runner
skills.description: Execute an API endpoint from a Swagger/OpenAPI spec — handles parameters, auth, and reporting

agents.name: api-test-reporter
agents.description: Orchestrate API test runs, persist results, and manage the live reporting dashboard

hooks.SessionStart: Verifies Node.js ≥ 18, installs via nvm/winget/brew/apt if missing, installs npm deps and Playwright browsers
hooks.PostToolUse: Detects api-runner.js execution and prints the dashboard URL banner in the terminal

changelog.1.2.0: Added hooks: SessionStart auto-installs Node.js and Playwright; PostToolUse prints dashboard link after every test run
changelog.1.1.0: Added real-time dashboard (SSE + Chart.js), pass/fail trend charts, stack trace inspection, PDF export via jsPDF + html2canvas, api-test-reporter agent
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — OpenAPI/Swagger spec parsing, Playwright HTTP execution, bearer token auto-acquisition, filesystem-as-parameters, path/query/body routing, CI-friendly exit codes
